raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The FDA advisors have unanimously recommended making Naloxone available over-the-counter.",
    "In the U.S., more than 150 people per day die of an overdose from fentanyl and other synthetic opioids.",
    "There were nearly 6,000 fentanyl overdose deaths in California in 2021.",
    "800 of the fentanyl overdose deaths in California in 2021 were individuals ages 24 and under.",
    "Currently, Naloxone is only available and covered by insurers and Medi-Cal if prescribed by a physician.",
    "Making Naloxone available over-the-counter is not sufficient; it must also be affordable to save lives."
  ]
}
```
